Special treatments and procedures: nursing rehabilitation/restorative care - range of motion (active). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
509 P3C P3C_NR_SPLINT (P3C) Splint or Brace Assistance CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: nursing rehabilitation/restorative care - splint or brace assistance. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
510 P3D P3D_NR_BED_MOBILE (P3D) Bed Mobility CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: nursing rehabilitation/restorative care - training and skill practice -bed
